subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath quaffed the choice wine from the hand of the bounty of his Lord, the All-Bountiful. Verily, We have sent down the verses and made them manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن شرب الرحیق من ید عطاء ربه الکریم انا انزلنا الایات و اظهرنا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
